_description: Actions the agent is allowed to execute autonomously. Every action MUST notify via Telegram. Actions in 'proposed' are suggestions from the weekly compilation — move to 'approved' to activate.

_example_action.description: Turn on suite AC at 24 degrees when humidity >= 70% after 18h
_example_action.notification: Turned on suite AC at 24 degrees — humidity was at {trigger_value}%.
